strengths: ~16 years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators at re:cinq
Founder of an open source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and product ownership
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership, published research, or recognized AI expertise
Career titles cap at Senior/Staff engineer — no Principal, Director, or strategic IC scope
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or driving cloud platform strategy at scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise or AI products built
Long engineering tenure with recent AI-agent tooling work

response.justification: The role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers — competencies the résumé does not substantiate. Years of experience are close to the 15-year bar, and the recent re:cinq role mentions MCP and agentic tooling, but there are no shipped AI products, platforms, publications, or strategic advisory engagements cited. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK at Optilyz, well short of the platform-strategy depth required. Titles top out at Staff/Senior with no evidence of influencing org-wide technical direction.
